message:
fix(record+crdt): Arc-wrap obligation registry indexes for registry_mirror, ORSet prunes empty entries after tombstone merge

Two follow-up fixes from concurrent agents:

1. **Obligation registry (symbolic_obligation.rs)**: by_object,
   by_holder, and by_region changed from RwLock<T> to
   Arc<RwLock<T>> so registry_mirror() can share the indexes
   with obligation handles without cloning the entire registry.
   unregister() signature reformatted (no logic change).
   Tests extended with assertions for obligations_for_region,
   obligations_for_task, and obligations_for_object at each
   lifecycle stage.

2. **ORSet tombstone cleanup (crdt.rs)**: After merging tombstones,
   the entries map now retains only values with non-empty tag sets,
   preventing unbounded memory growth from phantom entries whose
   tags were all tombstoned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
